context: Initial tool-use policy for the agent platform.
decision: Adopt tool-use policy v1: allow-list plus per-request authorization for unlisted services.

context: Governance working group proposes a tightening revision of the tool-use policy.
decision: Adopt tool-use policy v2a: retain the allow-list and add an explicit clause for shell-like tools.
rationale: Closes an audit finding on shell-like tools.

context: Platform safety working group also publishes a revision of the tool-use policy, unaware of policy-tooluse-v2a. Both records structurally declare themselves as the successor to policy-tooluse-v1.
decision: Adopt tool-use policy v2b: retain the allow-list and tighten the per-request authorization workflow.
rationale: Addresses a separate finding on per-request authorization latency.
